message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.4 tick 447 — rch cold-compile timeout; gap deferred

Attaches tick-447 bead comment. Attempted remote verification of
the Run 6 primitive group while all 8 rch workers were green;
hit 40-min tool-timeout at deep cold-compile phase (tantivy,
fastmcp, frankensearch, mux, codec) before reaching test-exec.
Same pattern as tick 375. Warm-cache strategy (tick 393) is the
only workable approach for multi-group coverage and requires more
wall-time than a single tick provides. Deferring.

Local 109/109 remains green; remote 88/88 snapshot at tick 413 remains
the authoritative last capture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
